positive: A symmetrical celestial forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna within a crescent moon landscape. The main elements are intricate, highly contrasting silhouettes of stylized animals (like hummingbirds and foxes) interacting with oversized, geometric flower clusters and glowing mycelial threads. Use a highly graphic, art-deco woodland style with deep indigo blues, glowing teal, cosmic purples, and pops of vivid gold. The composition must be central, clean, and suitable for repeating apparel prints, emphasizing strong outlines and negative space. Focus on crystalline textures and perfect symmetry. Minimalist, graphic novel aesthetic, vector art quality.
